item.content:encoded: So… I have some kinda strong opinions on this, which I can summarize as this: Don't use human trafficking as a way to shit on anime fans. It's not as "powerful" or "clever" as you think it is.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thank you for reconsidering my purchase of a custom body pillow. Yeah… I didn't… need it anyway… not if he'd end up like that… The last thing I need is my view on the character tainted more with the idea of him reeling at the thought of a hug.

+1 tho gg man

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Excellently disgusting, gives you an interesting perspective on dakimakura, as well as the kinds of people have purchase them. +1

*Vomits for three hours straight*

And of course Ollie is involved in this… this is one of the most disgusting things on this wesite.

Easy upvote, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
If there is an demand, someone will sell it. While this specific subset of people. (get sexual with fictional characters and body pillows) tend to be rare, I've personally met some of them. (Men and Women) Considering we have entire corporations which do similarly nasty things I don't know what exactly your problem with this one is. IMO it makes sense that someone would make this SCP. After all, why not? There are more ridiculous things around and about.

The whole point is to be gross, is it an low hanging fruit? sure. Personally I like the unsettling disgusting SCPs.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was my take-away as well. The first half read like an article auto-generated from text on r/justneckbeardthings. Anime fans are gross and like hug pillows, amirite?

Then came the second part and the big reveal that the body pillows were people, which just came across as nonsensical and distasteful. What was the intent behind this twist? Was it to show that exploitation, even of fictional characters, is gross? That people demand a level of obedience and subservience from idealized characters that would be degrading and awful in real life? As currently written, it just comes across as a way to shoehorn in some group I don't care at all about, and to show what bad dudes the group is.

-1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
i liked it before i got to the review, then i hated it
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: made me wanna throw up so thats an instant 10/10

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I couldn't really get into this one. It's dark and disturbing, but in a way that feels more just mundanely uncomfortable rather than uncanny or suspenseful. Topics like sexual abuse are hard to address in supernatural horror and I don't know if this article really has the sense of gravity to pull that off. In general, the ATF scips make me a bit wary because I can't shake the feeling that they fall back on negative stereotypes of anime fans and furries in a way that doesn't really subvert those tropes and just winds up in this awkward zone between goofy/ironic and disturbing.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: lets see how they like getting stuffed in a pillow

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: those pore pillows .. to live only one year and that year to be so .. horrific .. ATF must burn +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: aight, this is my favorite ATF SCP now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: so ATF stands for All The Fetishes now, huh?

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded: This actually made my stomach churn a bit, 10/10 would feel awful again.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: ATF is beginning to become an interesting goi, with this and the furry one (I forget the number). I wonder what other articles will be written about them? I especially like the character dynamics in the chat logs.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Enjoy my Sin Article

I liked the idea of ATF from the beginning, so here's another skip about them!

Big thanks to Dog Teeth, the creator of ATF and a big provider of crit for this article!

Also thanks to LordStoneFish, DrChandra, FloppyPhoenix, JackalRelated, Gabriel Jade, BananaRepublic, Fieldstone, Mlister and anyone else that I missed for crit!
